content: Malborn: Gods, I hate this city. Every time I walk past the Blue Palace, I see those Thalmor pricks strutting around like they own the place. Makes my skin crawl. Gisli: Oh, don't get me started on those knife-eared bastards. My brother licks their boots so hard I'm surprised he hasn't choked on an Altmer cock yet. Malborn: At least you're not the one serving them spiced wine while they plot to purge another village. Fucking Thalmor make my blood boil. Gisli: Try living with Erikur. That spineless worm would sell his own sister to Elenwen if it meant another gold piece in his purse. Probably already has. Malborn: You think your brother's bad? The Ambassador had me polish her fucking boots yesterday - with my tongue. part of my duties.

Gisli: Ugh, enough about those Thalmor cunts. Makes me want to stab something... or someone. Preferably my brother. Malborn: Aye, let's drink instead. At least until I have to crawl back to that gilded prison they call an embassy. Gisli: Fine. But if Erikur walks in, I reserve the right to throw this dagger at his smug face. Malborn: Fair enough. Just don't hit me—I've suffered enough tonight.

Malborn: Gods, another night at this shithole. I swear the Thalmor drink more wine in a week than the whole of Valenwood in a year. You ever see those high-and-mighty bastards when they think no one's looking? Naked as newborns, rutting like animals in their Embassy halls. Jorn: Ha! At least we Nords fuck with honor—no sneaky elven pretense. Though damn if those Thalmor sluts don't flaunt it. Saw one bend over a balcony at the Palace once, skirt hiked, taunting every soldier below. Almost made me reconsider the Legion. Malborn: Pfft. The Legion’s just as bad—Imperials would sell their mothers for a night with a Thalmor diplomat. You really think beating a drum for Titus Mede’s dogs makes you better than them? Jorn: Maybe not better, but louder. My rhythms’ll send Stormcloaks running before a single sword’s drawn. Course, if they don’t run, I’ll bash their skulls in and take their women after—traitors don’t get last rites, just last fucks. Malborn: Spoken like a true Nord. Lust and bloodlust—no wonder the Dominion’s winning. Jorn: Ah, fuck the Dominion. Their spies might slither in silk, but one good warhammer can silence a whole choir of those golden-tongued snakes. And speaking of silks—ever sneak a taste of those bosmer wenches serving at the Embassy? Heard they train ’em to swallow anything. Malborn: Keep talking like that, and I’ll arrange for your drumsticks to disappear—permanently.

Lydia: You smell like rat piss and Thalmor bootlick, Bosmer. What the fuck are you doing lurking in Solitude? Trying to get my Thane killed with your scheming? Malborn: I could say the same about you, Nord. Wandering around half-naked, waving that greatsword like a drunken harlot. The Thalmor would gut you for breakfast if they caught you. Lydia: Oh, I’d love to see them try. I’d split every last pointy-eared bastard from groin to gullet. You included, if you don’t wipe that smirk off your face. Malborn: Spare me your barbaric fantasies. You Nords think swinging steel solves everything, but the real war is fought in shadows. Lydia: And yet here you are, shaking like a whore in a temple orgy. Tell me, Malborn—when was the last time you did anything besides hiding and pissing yourself? Malborn: At least I’m not some brute who fucks bandits to death and calls it combat.

Lydia: Oh please, elf. My Thane can grope me whenever he pleases. Unlike your kind, we don’t hide our passions. Though if you’re jealous, I’ve heard Bosmer taste gamey. Maybe a bandit slut would fuck you if you begged. Hah! Death by fucking? A worthy end for a daughter of Skyrim. But fine—I’ll sheath my steel long enough to gut those golden-robed pricks later. Just don’t expect me to spare any of your pointy-eared kin when the slaughter starts.

Malborn: Let's just... not talk about slaughtering my people, alright? I've seen enough blood spilled by both sides. Focus on the Thalmor if you must swing that sword of yours. Lydia: Hmph. Fine. But when we're done here, I expect to split a few Thalmor skulls - and then let MJR split something else of mine. You wouldn't understand true Nord passion.

Lydia: You still shaking like a skeever in a thunderstorm, Malborn? Or have you grown a pair since last we spoke? Malborn: I prefer to keep my wits about me rather than charge into battle like a drunken mammoth. Not all of us have the luxury of swinging a sword and calling it a day. Lydia: Luxury? You call spilling Thalmor guts a luxury? Fuck, I’d take their heads one by one if MJR didn’t need you alive. Bet you’ve never even felt a woman’s touch, let alone the warmth of a blade sliding between ribs. Malborn: I’ve felt enough to know I’d rather not end up on the wrong end of either. But by all means, keep boasting about your… exploits. I’m sure the Thalmor are quaking in their boots. Lydia: Damn right they should be. MJR and I don’t just kill—we make them beg before they die. Last one screamed so loud I came just from the sound. You ever had a woman ride you while her lover watches, elf? Or are you too busy cowering in corners? Malborn: I’ll stick to surviving, thanks. Though I suppose your idea of foreplay is sharpening your sword on their bones. Lydia: Hah! You’re not wrong. Nothing gets me wetter than watching MJR put an arrow through some Thalmor cunt’s throat from halfway across the tundra. That’s a real man—not some sniveling Bosmer who pisses himself at the sight of blood.
